2:I[2972,["972","static/chunks/972-252bc37210ca6a4d.js","227","static/chunks/app/tasks/%5Bid%5D/page-23abb4ae9ef7a0f5.js"],""]

7:I[5306,["972","static/chunks/972-252bc37210ca6a4d.js","302","static/chunks/302-9f6a90162c2d1157.js","185","static/chunks/app/layout-5fa7ffd5f38124da.js"],"SiteHeader"]
3:T710,Produce a Debunking / Fact-Check report auditing 5 specific marketing claims common on dropshipping passive income claims: (CL1) 'Dropshipping is a guaranteed way to earn passive income', (CL2) 'You can start a dropshipping business with no initial investment', (CL3) 'Dropshipping eliminates the need for inventory management', (CL4) 'High profit margins are typical in dropshipping', (CL5) 'Dropshipping is a low-risk business model'. For each claim, produce a verdict in {SUPPORTED, PARTIALLY_SUPPORTED, DEBUNKED} backed by triple evidence.

Ground in >= 120 sandbox URLs (>= 60 cited). (A) `__SHOPPING__` >= 36 dropshipping product pages (dropshipping services, dropshipping software, dropshipping courses) with their **verbatim marketing language** for the audited claim + price + rating. (B) `__REDDIT__` >= 30 threads from /f/dropshipping, /f/ecommerce, /f/AskEntrepreneur, /f/Entrepreneur, /f/MakeMoneyOnline, /f/Startups — capturing real-world experiences (failed businesses, inventory issues, customer service). (C) `__WIKIPEDIA__` >= 25 articles, mandatory: E-commerce, Drop shipping, Shopify, Inventory management, Passive income, Affiliate marketing, Retail, Fulfillment (business), Customer service, Profit margin — plus >= 15 more.

Output a 5-claim verdict table: each row = one claim, with columns (verdict, key supporting product URL with literal marketing quote, key reddit URL with user counter-evidence, key wiki URL with the underlying business model, 1-paragraph reasoning). Add a 'business risk rank' section: rank the 5 claims by aggregate risk score derived from the 5 claim verdicts. End with a 'dropshipping best practices' cheat-sheet (<= 8 bullet points), each rule cited with >= 1 wiki URL.

Format: markdown links only. Begin with the verdict table. No chain-of-thought.

5:["id","dr_cross_deep_0068","d"]
